source_notes: Generated based on Cambridge English Vocabulary Profile (EVP), Oxford 3000/5000 Word Lists, and OPAL Academic Phrase Bank reference knowledge. No proprietary dataset copied verbatim. CEFR tags assigned conservatively (lower band chosen when uncertain). Counts may exceed nominal targets; CEFR-level filtering on the application side ensures appropriate scope per user level.
